cleavage agent: tryptic digestion was performed overnight using sequencing-grade trypsin
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation of the 20 most intense ions
instrument: hybrid quadrupole–orbitrap mass spectrometer (Orbitrap Exploris 240, Thermo)
ionization type: MS data acquisition was performed in positive ion mode
labeling: tannase activity was measured following the method previously reported by Sharma et al.
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM DTT at 56 °C for 1 h
